summary: Full backend + frontend testing of RxGuard app. All 14 backend API tests passed. Landing page, login/register UI, dashboard, sidebar all working. Critical bug: /api-keys route is intercepted by Kubernetes backend proxy (starts with /api) and returns FastAPI 404.

ui_bugs.issue: Route /api-keys is broken — Kubernetes ingress routes all /api-prefixed paths to the FastAPI backend (port 8001). Navigating to /api-keys hits the backend which returns {"detail":"Not Found"}. The React ApiKeys component is never rendered.

issues: 'Verify Prescription' nav item shows as 'Verify Prescription' but requirement mentions it — it's present as first item which is good. No issues found with sidebar branding.

action_items: CRITICAL: Rename /api-keys route to /keys or /manage-keys (anything not starting with /api) in App.js, SideBar.js navigation links. The Kubernetes ingress proxies all /api* paths to the FastAPI backend so /api-keys is unreachable from the frontend.
Profile page is auth-gated and redirects to /login for unauthenticated users — this is correct behavior. Testing confirmed login → profile works when authenticated.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: Route /api-keys in App.js conflicts with Kubernetes /api prefix ingress routing. Fix: rename to /keys, /manage-keys, or /developer-keys.
Profile page correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /login.
Auth flow (register → dashboard redirect, login → dashboard redirect) works correctly using data-testid='auth-submit-btn'.
Email sending returns 503 as expected when RESEND_API_KEY is not configured.

success_rate.frontend: 70% (landing, login/register, dashboard working; /api-keys broken; profile requires auth)

seed_data_creation: Registered testpharmacy@rxguard.test via backend tests. 20 seed audit records already present from startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Main critical bug: /api-keys route broken due to /api prefix Kubernetes ingress conflict. Once renamed, test: API Keys empty state, Create Key modal, new key banner. Profile page (requires login) and email modal (expected 503 with no RESEND key) still need testing after login. Use data-testid='auth-submit-btn' for login form submission (not 'button:has-text(Sign In)' which matches the tab).

rca_of_issue.root_cause: The Kubernetes ingress in this preview environment routes ALL requests with path prefix /api to the backend service on port 8001. The React route /api-keys matches this prefix (/api-keys starts with /api), so it gets forwarded to FastAPI as /keys which has no handler, returning 404.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Rename frontend route and all navigation links from /api-keys to a non-/api-prefixed path e.g. /keys or /manage-keys. Update: App.js Route definition, SideBar.js Link href, ApiKeys.js if it has any self-references.
